plan_metadata.name: group  validation customize AzureAI in copilot

steps.description: Click the "Message Copilot" input box in the M365 Copilot web application, within the agent chat interface, focusing on the area where users enter text to start a conversation.

parameters.text: Tell me the history of Contoso Electronics, format in a table.

steps.description: Enter "Tell me the history of Contoso Electronics, format in a table." into the "Message Copilot" input box in the M365 Copilot web app.
Press the Enter key in the message input box of the M365 Copilot chat interface to submit the query: "Tell me the history of Contoso Electronics, format in a table".
